title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Full Stack Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
